amplification_reinforced_equation.strength_term: A_reinforce = mix(S_amp_score, R_amp, S_sustain_score, M_brain_direct_v17, R_train_v23)
amplification_reinforced_equation.learning_term: L_reinforce = mix(L_amp, L_sustain, D_feature_v17, B_plastic_v23, R_train_v23)
amplification_reinforced_equation.system_term: M_reinforce = A_reinforce + S_reinforce + R_reinforce + L_reinforce + R_reinforce_sys - P_reinforce

project_readout.summary: 更大系统持续放大强化开始直接检测放大趋势能否继续增强，而不是只停留在轻度放大。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把这组强化结果并回脑编码直测和训练终式，确认放大趋势是否开始从弱放大进入稳态放大。
